final_answer_mv: You cannot guarantee beating inflation; the closest approach is buying U.S. inflation‑indexed bonds like TIPS or Series I Savings Bonds, which track CPI‑U to preserve purchasing power and only exceed inflation if you lock in a positive real/fixed rate (before taxes), typically by holding to maturity.
final_answer_cs: You cannot guarantee beating inflation, but U.S. Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS) and Series I Savings Bonds index to CPI-U to preserve purchasing power and will only outperform inflation if their real (for TIPS) or fixed (for I Bonds) rate is positive, before taxes.
